keywords.name: Agile
keywords.description: Triggered. When a battle ends involving one of your spirits that costs less than this card, you may return that spirit to your hand. If you do, you may summon this card (paying its normal cost).

keywords.name: Armor
keywords.description: Constant. This spirit cannot be selected by the effects of your opponent's spirits, nexuses, or magic of the specified colors.

keywords.name: Ascend
keywords.description: Additional summoning requirement. When summoning this card, you must also place all cores from one of your spirits that meets the specified condition into your reserve.

keywords.name: Astral
keywords.description: Constant. While active, this spirit can only be blocked by spirits that also have Astral. Active timing is shown on the card; if no timing is listed, it is always active. If gained multiple times with overlapping timings, only one instance is active.

keywords.name: A.T. Field
keywords.description: Constant. While this spirit has a soul core on it, it cannot be destroyed by destruction effects on your opponent's spirits.

keywords.name: Awaken
keywords.description: Activated. Usable during any flash window while this spirit is on the field. Move any number of cores from your other field cards onto this spirit. When Destroyed effects on those cards do not trigger from this effect.

keywords.name: Blessed
keywords.description: Triggered. When this spirit attacks unblocked and reduces your opponent's life, place 1 core from the void into your life. Only activates once even if gained multiple times.

keywords.name: Bloodcurse
keywords.description: Triggered. When one of your spirits with Curse or Bloodcurse reduces your opponent's life, the lost life cores go to the void instead of their reserve.

keywords.name: Burst
keywords.description: Set this card facedown in your burst area without paying its cost. Activates for free when its trigger condition is met.

keywords.name: Chain
keywords.description: Activates as a continuation of another effect on the same card. Only activates if you control a symbol of the specified color.

keywords.name: Confront
keywords.description: Constant. When this spirit attacks, your opponent must declare a block if they control any refreshed spirit. Spirits with Armor that cannot normally be targeted by effects can still be chosen as the blocker.

keywords.name: Crush
keywords.description: Triggered. When this spirit attacks, your opponent discards cards from the top of their deck equal to this spirit's level + the specified modifier (0 if no modifier shown). If gained multiple times, only the version with the highest modifier activates.

keywords.name: Curse
keywords.description: Triggered. When this spirit is blocked, the blocking spirit is destroyed at end of battle. Only activates once even if gained multiple times.

keywords.name: Feast
keywords.description: Summons a Supsprite Token based on what you currently control: no tokens → Small; one Small token → remove its cores to reserve and summon a Medium; one Medium token → remove its cores and summon a Large. If you have multiple Small or Medium tokens, choose one to upgrade.

keywords.name: Gale
keywords.description: Triggered. When this spirit is blocked, your opponent exhausts the specified number (N) of their refreshed spirits. If gained multiple times, only the version with the highest N activates.

keywords.name: Immortal
keywords.description: Triggered. When this spirit is in your trash and another spirit you control that meets the specified condition is destroyed, you may summon this spirit from your trash for free.

keywords.name: Link
keywords.description: Triggered. When one of your spirits that meets the specified condition attacks, you may exhaust this spirit to link it to the attacker for the battle. While linked, the attacker gains this spirit's BP and symbols. Only one link per battle; an already-linked spirit cannot link again. If either spirit leaves the field, the link ends immediately.

keywords.name: Luster
keywords.description: Triggered. When this spirit attacks, at end of battle return all magic cards you used during this battle from your trash to your hand. Cards that ended up somewhere other than your trash will not return.

keywords.name: Raid
keywords.description: Triggered. When this spirit attacks, you may exhaust one of your nexuses to refresh this spirit. Can activate up to the specified number of times (N) per turn. If gained multiple times, only the version with the highest N activates.

keywords.name: Swift
keywords.description: Activated. During a flash window, you may summon this card from your hand. The cost can only be paid using cores from your reserve — cores on field cards cannot be used.
